case_title: RCI FINANCIAL CORP. RETIREMENT TRUST VS. TRIBECCA PROPERTIES, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CERT.MAIL FOR JOHN MORRO RETURNED SIGNED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RCI FINANCIAL CORP. RETIREMENT TRUST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RCI FINANCIAL CORP. RETIREMENT TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIBECCA PROPERTIES, LLC WILSON, KEITH $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $658.85 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,768.85, DEFENDANT JOHN MORRO DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
